message:
fix(writing/slack-mattermost): update hero download-CTA subtitle to match the new primer scope

The `<MarkdownDownloadButton />` hero caption was fixed in the prior
commit (`Download the operator primer as Markdown · agent-readable
handoff · pairs with the three skills`), but the paragraph of
supporting copy directly underneath it still said:

    The 2.5k-line source guide. Paste the path into Claude Code or
    Codex and the agent drives the migration from there.

That line dates from when the primer actually was ~2,500 lines. The
file is now ~290 lines (down from 2,575 after the trim passes, then
back up from 175 after adding back the agent-navigation sections),
so "2.5k-line source guide" was flatly wrong and made the button
claim unbelievable.

Replaced with:

    The agent-readable companion to the three skills. Paste the path
    into Claude Code or Codex and the agent has everything it needs
    to drive the migration.

Same length, same tone, and the framing — "companion to the three
skills" — is stable under future edits to the primer's line count.
Also stops advertising the primer as a standalone manual, which is
the same framing shift the button caption now uses.

Caught on live verification after the previous deploy; only the
button caption had been fixed there.

Verified: `bun run build` exits 0.

files.patch:
@@ -722,7 +722,7 @@ export function SlackMigrationArticle() {

- The 2.5k-line source guide. Paste the path into Claude Code or Codex and the agent drives the migration from there. + The agent-readable companion to the three skills. Paste the path into Claude Code or Codex and the agent has everything it needs to drive the migration.
